questions.question: Describe what an algorithm is in your own words, highlighting its key characteristics.
questions.hint: Provide a clear and concise definition

questions.question: What is the main difference between a recipe and an algorithm?
questions.hint: Focus on the process of solving a problem

questions.question: What is the purpose of a step-by-step procedure in solving an algorithmic problem?
questions.hint: Emphasize the role of predictability and reproducibility
